task.summary: Default task
README Update2
README Update2
General update
Changed operators s to mS and t to mT
Added Tests of the #QBit in the Gate's calls + abort when error
Added Tests of the #QBit in the Gate's calls + abort when error
Added Tests of the #QBit in the Gate's calls + abort when error
Added Tests of the #QBit in the Gate's calls + abort when error
updated gitignore
updated gitignore
Images dir / Wiki
Images dir / Wiki
Trace Labels
format number in output (Euler)
Advanced operators support (alias method in QOperator)
main with example
main with example
Building Scaladoc Cleaning the code
Scaladoc in progress Cleaning up the code
Scaladoc still in progress Fixed bug in Phase display Cleaning up code
Fixed setRadians/setDegrees Scaladoc still in progress
Back to dev Maintenance fixes
Use rr.trace(useASCII = true) to avoid the console problems. (Windows for instance) This outputs only ascii characters...
Use rr.trace(useASCII = true) to avoid the console problems. FIX 1 : Pi, degre, and tab

Added config for QReg.DefaultDrawAllState, QReg.DefaultObjIsAntiClock, QReg.DefaultObjIsInRadians, QReg.DefaultObjPhaseNormalization, QReg.DefaultObjUseASCII + fixed ASCII + added support for counterclockwise or clockwise phase + added visual hints for the way it goes + added support in the flower drawing + fixed some bugs (offsets in display)

Added marks on all circle drawing to have a visual hint about the way the phases are drawn (left / right for counter clock wise and opposite) Added degree to the flower drawing. Minor fixes (mainly string size)
Removed the temp.png file for pdf output fixed the phase display in pdf to (much) more visible
Removed the temp.png file for pdf output fixed the phase display in pdf to (much) more visible
Removed the temp.png file for pdf output fixed the phase display in pdf to (much) more visible
Removed the temp.png file for pdf output fixed the phase display in pdf to (much) more visible .
Removed the temp.png file for pdf output fixed the phase display in pdf to (much) more visible ..
Removed the temp.png file for pdf output fixed the phase display in pdf to (much) more visible ..
Fixed the angle display as Euler Strings (now with 2 decimals) Fixed the inner color on the pdf as light gray
Added rr.?() to read the measure added histogram to QStudy Changed toBinary to use by default the log2 Changed the random generator to the Split from J8 (faster)
Added display of angle right below the R operator in the pad (circuit) Fixed the angle display when no decimals Fixed the noNormalizations in the drawStates (with circles)
Fixed the pdf output
Fixed the pdf output
Fixed display pb for windows 10
Added color in the render view for swap and cond
Many enhancements. Can Poke a new State to a QBit (and peek it) + new randomizer for random State. Fixed rendering with red color for conditionnal. Fixed Step display of operator (for confitionnal)
Fixed and enhanced the labels for the traces (Swap, Function etc). Added a standard display for global phase correction in the trace.

Enhanced the trace of circle drawings. Now 8 QBits are possible, then the display switch to simple circles. Fixed the drivers for Conditionnal (CNot etc..) (a mini visual shift could occur for more than 6 Qbits).
Enhancement. Drawcircleimage : added zoomparam = 0 : request an auto zoom for the drawing.
Update V.Ensibs
Toffoli Bug Corrected
Added read exclusion for mono circle display (when you perform a measure, the discarded states are half circle for mono circle display : this has been fixed)

MESSAGE.value: Scaladoc in progress Cleaning up the code
Scaladoc still in progress Fixed bug in Phase display Cleaning up code
Fixed setRadians/setDegrees Scaladoc still in progress
Back to dev Maintenance fixes
Use rr.trace(useASCII = true) to avoid the console problems. (Windows for instance) This outputs only ascii characters...
Use rr.trace(useASCII = true) to avoid the console problems. FIX 1 : Pi, degre, and tab

Added config for QReg.DefaultDrawAllState, QReg.DefaultObjIsAntiClock, QReg.DefaultObjIsInRadians, QReg.DefaultObjPhaseNormalization, QReg.DefaultObjUseASCII + fixed ASCII + added support for counterclockwise or clockwise phase + added visual hints for the way it goes + added support in the flower drawing + fixed some bugs (offsets in display)

Added marks on all circle drawing to have a visual hint about the way the phases are drawn (left / right for counter clock wise and opposite) Added degree to the flower drawing. Minor fixes (mainly string size)
Removed the temp.png file for pdf output fixed the phase display in pdf to (much) more visible
Removed the temp.png file for pdf output fixed the phase display in pdf to (much) more visible .
Removed the temp.png file for pdf output fixed the phase display in pdf to (much) more visible ..
Fixed the angle display as Euler Strings (now with 2 decimals) Fixed the inner color on the pdf as light gray
Added rr.?() to read the measure added histogram to QStudy Changed toBinary to use by default the log2 Changed the random generator to the Split from J8 (faster)
Added display of angle right below the R operator in the pad (circuit) Fixed the angle display when no decimals Fixed the noNormalizations in the drawStates (with circles)
Fixed the pdf output
Fixed display pb for windows 10
Added color in the render view for swap and cond
Many enhancements. Can Poke a new State to a QBit (and peek it) + new randomizer for random State. Fixed rendering with red color for conditionnal. Fixed Step display of operator (for confitionnal)
Fixed and enhanced the labels for the traces (Swap, Function etc). Added a standard display for global phase correction in the trace.

Enhanced the trace of circle drawings. Now 8 QBits are possible, then the display switch to simple circles. Fixed the drivers for Conditionnal (CNot etc..) (a mini visual shift could occur for more than 6 Qbits).
Enhancement. Drawcircleimage : added zoomparam = 0 : request an auto zoom for the drawing.
Update V.Ensibs
Toffoli Bug Corrected
Added read exclusion for mono circle display (when you perform a measure, the discarded states are half circle for mono circle display : this has been fixed)

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Added read exclusion for mono circle display (when you perform a measure, the discarded states are half circle for mono circle display : this has been fixed)
